debug_info.goal:
case some.some.none
𝕜 : Type u_3
α : Type u_4
mα : MeasurableSpace α
inst✝² : DiscreteMeasurableSpace α
inst✝¹ : Fintype α
inst✝ : RCLike 𝕜
f g : α → 𝕜
p q : NNReal
hr₀ : none ≠ 0
hpqr : ENNReal.HolderTriple (some p) (some q) none
⊢ ‖f * g‖ₙ_[none] ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[some p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[some q]

proof:
exfalso
    have := hpqr.inv_add_inv_eq_inv
    simp at this
failed_attempts:
simp only [ENNReal.none_eq_top] at hpqr
    have := hpqr.inv_add_inv_eq_inv
    simp only [ENNReal.inv_top, ENNReal.coe_ne_top, inv_eq_top] at this
    rcases this with ⟨hp, hq⟩
    simp only [ENNReal.coe_eq_zero] at hp hq
    simp only [hp, hq, ENNReal.coe_zero, cLpNorm_exponent_zero, mul_zero, cLpNorm_nonneg]

simp only [WithTop.none_eq_top] at hpqr
    have := hpqr.inv_add_inv_eq_inv_of_ne_top (ENNReal.coe_ne_top) (ENNReal.coe_ne_top)
    simp at this

simp only [WithTop.none_eq_top] at hpqr ⊢
    exact cLpNorm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm' _ _ _

simp only [WithTop.none_eq_top] at hpqr
    exact (ENNReal.HolderTriple.ne_top_of_ne_top_of_ne_top (ENNReal.coe_ne_top) (ENNReal.coe_ne_top) hpqr).elim

simp only [ENNReal.none_eq_top, cLpNorm_top, Pi.mul_apply]
    calc ‖f * g‖ₙ_[⊤] = ⨆ a, ‖f a * g a‖₊ := by rfl
      _ ≤ ⨆ a, ‖f a‖₊ * ‖g a‖₊ := by gcongr with a; exact nnnorm_mul_le _ _
      _ ≤ (⨆ a, ‖f a‖₊) * (⨆ a, ‖g a‖₊) := ciSup_mul_ciSup_le (fun a ↦ ‖f a‖₊) (fun a ↦ ‖g a‖₊)
      _ = ‖f‖ₙ_[⊤] * ‖g‖ₙ_[⊤] := by rfl
      _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[↑p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[↑q] := by
        have := hpqr.inv_add_inv_eq_inv
        simp only [ENNReal.inv_top, add_zero, ENNReal.coe_eq_zero, inv_eq_zero] at this
        simp [this.1, this.2]

simp only [ENNReal.none_eq_top] at hpqr
    exact absurd rfl hpqr.r_ne_top

simp only [WithTop.none_eq_top] at hpqr
    have h := hpqr.inv_add_inv_eq_inv_add_inv
    simp only [ENNReal.inv_top, add_zero, ENNReal.add_eq_zero, ENNReal.inv_eq_zero,
      ENNReal.coe_ne_top, and_self] at h

simp only [ENNReal.none_eq_top] at hpqr ⊢
    exact hpqr.cLpNorm_mul_le

simp only [ENNReal.none_eq_top] at hpqr ⊢
    exact cLpNorm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm _ _ _
successful_attempts:
exfalso
    have := hpqr.inv_add_inv_eq_inv
    simp at this
